mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders
SELECT id, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET user_id = #{userId}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, total_amount, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}
